# Form 8825 Prototype - Copilot Instructions

This is a React TypeScript application built with Vite for creating a Form 8825 prototype.

## Project Structure
- Built with React 18 and TypeScript
- Uses Vite as the build tool for fast development
- Modern CSS with CSS variables for theming
- Component-based architecture

## Development Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for all React components
- Follow React functional component patterns with hooks
- Use CSS modules or styled-components for component styling
- Implement responsive design principles
- Focus on accessibility and semantic HTML

## Form 8825 Context
This prototype is for IRS Form 8825 (Rental Real Estate Income and Expenses). When creating components:
- Consider form validation for tax-related inputs
- Implement proper number formatting for currency
- Include helpful tooltips for tax terminology
- Structure data to match IRS form sections
